name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
description: Installs Caddy with an s6-supervised config watcher for dynamically managed development reverse proxies.

version.description: Caddy package version to install. `latest` installs the current stable package.

acmeCa.description: Optional ACME directory URL used by Caddy's automatic HTTPS issuer.

acmeCaRoot.description: Optional path inside the container to the public root certificate that protects the ACME endpoint.

configUser.description: User allowed to manage Caddy fragments. Automatic selection prefers the remote user, container user, `vscode`, then `root`.
